bookswin.display_name: Require completion of Instruction Books to Win
description: Turn on this option to require completion of instruction books.
If there's only one instruction book, you don't need this toggled on.

bagswin.display_name: Require completion of all Bags to Win
description: Turn on this option to require completion of all bags.
Both Bags and Pages can be toggled on.

pageswin.display_name: Require completion of all Pages to Win
description: Turn on this option to require completion of all pages.
Both Bags and Pages can be toggled on.
